title: disperis humblotii
intro: Disperis humblotii, also known as the Madagascar disperma, is a plant species native to Madagascar and is classified under the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Disperis humblotii include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
